texto: We are the puzzle pieces who seldom fit with other puzzle pieces. We inhabit singledom as our natural resting state...Secretly, we are romantics, romantics of the highest order. We want a miracle. Out of millions we have to find the one who will understand. For the quirkyalone, there is no patience for dating just for the sake of not being alone. On a fine but by no means transcendent date, we dream of going home to watch television. We would prfer to be alone with our own thoughts than with a less than perfect fit...but when the quirkyalone collides with another, ooh la la. The earth quakes.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sasha Cagen sobre temas ligados a motivacao. A afirmação “We are the puzzle pieces who seldom fit with other puzzle pieces. We inhabit singledom as our nat…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, solitude, reflexao, útil em momentos de termino e reflexao.
